Title: saveDayPlan fails with null date validation
PreCondition: DTO with date=null, mealUuids={} provided to saveDayPlan()
Steps: 1. Create DayMealsDto with date=null 2. Call plannerService.saveDayPlan(dto)
ExpectedResult: IllegalArgumentException thrown with message 'date is required'
ActualResult: NullPointerException: cannot invoke "java.sql.Date.toLocalDate()" because "date" is null
RootCause: Missing null check before toLocalDate() conversion in mapDayMealsToDayPlan method

Title: RecipeService cache miss doesn't persist recipe to DB
Description: Recipe fetched from external API but not saved to local repository
PreCondition: UUID does not exist in recipeRepo, external API returns valid recipe
Steps: 1. Call recipeService.getRecipeById(newUuid) 2. Verify recipe not in recipeRepo 3. Query DB for recipe after call
ExpectedResult: Recipe should be persisted in recipeRepo and queryable from DB
ActualResult: Recipe returned from service is not found in DB query
RootCause: Missing recipeRepo.saveRecipe() call in cache-miss code path after API fetch

Title: Blank UUID strings treated as non-existent instead of error
Description: getRecipeById with "   " (whitespace) returns Optional.empty instead of throwing IllegalArgumentException
PreCondition: uuid parameter contains only whitespace characters, e.g., "   "
ExpectedResult: IllegalArgumentException should be thrown with message 'uuid is required'
ActualResult: Optional.empty() returned, treated as cache miss, API call attempted
RootCause: UUID validation check uses isBlank() which should catch whitespace but appears to not be catching all cases

Title: getDayPlan throws exception for dates with no stored plan
Description: getDayPlan(nonExistentDate) throws NullPointerException instead of returning empty plan
PreCondition: Query date with no stored meal slots in public.meals table
Steps: 1. Query date with guaranteed no data 2. Call plannerService.getDayPlan(date)
ExpectedResult: Return DayPlan with empty meals map
RootCause: plannerRepo.getDayPlan() returns empty mealUuids map, but code assumes keySet() is always populated

Title: Recipe save with empty name not validated
Description: saveRecipe accepts recipe.name = null or empty string
PreCondition: Recipe object with name=null or name="" passed to saveRecipe()
Steps: 1. Create Recipe with null/empty name 2. Call recipeRepo.saveRecipe(recipe) 3. Query DB
ActualResult: Recipe persisted to DB with null/empty name, later queries may fail
RootCause: Name field not validated for NOT NULL constraint at application layer
